title: ctenodon molliculus var. molliculus
intro: Ctenodon molliculus var. molliculus, also known as the hairy ctenodon, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ctenodon molliculus var. molliculus include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine for their therapeutic properties.
